name: tree-unicorn
title: Tree Unicorn
description: Editorial nature WebGL hero built with Unicorn Studio — ancient oak tree with a neon pixel mouse-reveal effect. Awwwards-style layout with specimen annotation panel.

files.content:

{/* Top bar */}
Nature Series — 001
{/* Left column — vertically centered, compact */}
Ancient & Alive Where roots remember. Every branch holds a century. Every ring, a story the ground never forgot.

Age ~300 Years
Location 48°52′N 2°21′E
